---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What problem are you trying to solve?**
A clear description of the use case or pain point. "I'm always frustrated
when…" is a good start.

**Describe the solution you'd like**
What you'd like to happen, and which package it belongs in.

**Alternatives you've considered**
Any workarounds or alternative approaches.

**Additional context**
Anything else — mockups, links, references to how other libraries do it.
